description_long: This object consists of two vertical wooden posts supporting a horizontal metallic bar, from which two rectangular cloth-like items are suspended using small brown clips. The posts have a blocky, pixelated texture reminiscent of wood, while the bar appears metallic and smooth. The hanging items are colored white and light pink, each with subtle patterns or markings, suggesting they are towels or garments. The clips are evenly spaced and securely hold the fabric in place. The overall construction is simple and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or semi-public urban environments such as parks, courtyards, or communal laundry areas. The design is open, allowing for airflow and easy access to the hanging items.
description: A wooden and metal hanger with two cloth items clipped and suspended, featuring a simple, open-frame design suitable for outdoor or communal use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cloth items clearly suspended from the metallic bar, with all clips and the full width of the hanger visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the posts and the depth of the hanging items, with less visibility of the cloth details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the cloth items and the supporting bar, with the clips and post structure still visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the side profiles of the cloth items and the arrangement of the clips.
